name: Chicken Curry
recipeIngredient: 4 skinless boneless chicken breasts (7 oz each)
15 to 16 oz canned garbanzo beans (rinsed and drained)
1 1/2 teaspoons curry powder (to taste, up to 2 tsp)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken, beans, onion, bell pepper, and pea pods in a 3 1/2- to 4-quart crock pot.
2. In a bowl, mix the remaining ingredients except rice.
3. Pour the mixture over the layered ingredients in the slow cooker.
4. Cover and cook on Low heat for 6-7 hours, or until vegetables are tender and the juice of chicken is no longer pink when thickest pieces are cut.
5. Serve over rice.
6. Serve with condiments such as shredded coconut, chopped peanuts, lime-soaked banana slices, raisins, and grated eggs.
